productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Brown Sandals
description: These leather sandals from red tape offer a stylish vibe coupled with unbelievable all-day comfort. If you want to look awesome and feel great, they're your best bet. Team them with jeans or chinos for a perfectly relaxed look. It was never easier to look spectacular, classy and in-vogue!
